///<reference types="svelte" />
;
import type { Snippet } from "svelte";

;type $$ComponentProps =  {
	items: Array<{ id: string; name: string }>;
	header?: Snippet;
	footer?: Snippet;
};function $$render() {



let { items, header, footer }:/*Ωignore_startΩ*/$$ComponentProps/*Ωignore_endΩ*/ = $props();

let selected = $state<string | null>(null);

function select(id: string) {
	selected = id;
}
;
async () => {

if(header){
	;__sveltets_2_ensureSnippet(header());
}

 { svelteHTML.createElement("ul", {});
	   for(let item of __sveltets_2_ensureArray(items)){item.id;
		 { svelteHTML.createElement("li", {    "onclick":() => select(item.id),});selected === item.id;
			item.name;
		 }
	}
 }

if(footer){
	;__sveltets_2_ensureSnippet(footer());
}

if(selected){
	 { svelteHTML.createElement("p", {}); selected; }
}
};
return { props: {} as any as $$ComponentProps, exports: {}, bindings: __sveltets_$$bindings(''), slots: {}, events: {} }}
const Complex__SvelteComponent_ = __sveltets_2_fn_component($$render());
/*Ωignore_startΩ*/type Complex__SvelteComponent_ = ReturnType<typeof Complex__SvelteComponent_>;
/*Ωignore_endΩ*/export default Complex__SvelteComponent_;
